description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of wood paneling on the exterior, giving it a warm, contemporary appearance. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front and rear facades, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. The house features a spacious wooden deck at the front, surrounded by landscaped greenery and several mature trees, enhancing its curb appeal. A detached garage with a sloped roof sits adjacent to the main structure, connected by a paved driveway that accommodates a parked car. The rear of the house includes additional green space and a small patio area, ideal for outdoor relaxation. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation characteristic of modern architectural styles.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, wood paneling, large windows, a front deck, and a detached garage surrounded by trees and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, wooden deck, driveway, detached garage, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the backyard, patio area, green space, and the back of the detached garage.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade with large windows, wooden deck, and more open green space with trees.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage, driveway, and the side elevation of the house with visible windows and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide glass door, wooden steps, and a covered porch integrated into the deck, flanked by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
